title: Map scheduling workflow
description: Interview the team, list key schedule states, and confirm what the timeline must communicate.

title: Finalize task scheduling contract
description: Define startDate/dueDate payloads, null handling, and validation responses shared by Rust and React.

title: Migrate task schedule columns
description: Ship nullable start and due date persistence while preserving existing task data.

title: Wire scheduler fields into task forms
description: Replace native date inputs with the shared picker and keep validation consistent in create and details views.

title: Polish timeline visual states
description: Tune current-time line, risk band, milestone bars, and restrained conflict styling.

title: Send implementation notes
description: Milestone-only task ending today so due-date-only rendering is visible.

title: Run scheduling QA pass
description: Verify persistence, reload behavior, timeline placement, and prerequisite conflict messaging.

title: Release candidate review
description: Final go/no-go checkpoint after QA signoff.

title: Import older backlog items
description: Unscheduled follow-up work to demonstrate the timeline backlog area.

title: Keyboard accessibility audit
description: Unscheduled audit task for calendar, timeline, and planner interactions.
